title: PlayerVaults999
description: PlayerVaults999 revolutionizes in-game storage by offering a seamlessly integrated vault system for Minecraft servers
body: PlayerVaults999 revolutionizes server storage by providing a comprehensive personal vault system designed for seamless player experience. Perfect for economy, RPG, or survival servers, this plugin empowers players with a configurable number of private, numbered vaults accessible via simple commands. Each vault is secured with individual permissions, allowing server owners to customize access tiers (e.g., VIPs could unlock higher-numbered vaults). The plugin boasts industry-leading item persistence, storing data in an optimized YAML format that preserves every enchantment, NBT tag, and custom item attribute—no more disappearing inventories. PlayerVaults999 automatically saves on vault close and server shutdown while maintaining exceptional performance through intelligent RAM caching. Admins get peace of mind with zero data loss guarantees, while players enjoy intuitive 54-slot chest GUIs identical to vanilla Minecraft storage. The perfect balance of security, flexibility, and reliability for servers that demand professional-grade player storage solutions
